design_goal: Phase 1 shared contract with unique canonical codes and enforcement of atomic fields, parent-child, and sensitive topics.

ros_owns: true review-of-systems symptom questions by system
system-specific pertinent positives and negatives not already captured in HPC/HPI

session_guardrails.emergent_override_rule: A newly volunteered red-flag symptom may temporarily pre-empt the scheduled complaint flow without creating a third planned complaint.

chills.plain_language_question: Have you felt cold or shivery without uncontrollable shaking?

rigors.plain_language_question: Have you had shaking chills or rigors that made your body shake?

malaise.plain_language_question: Have you generally felt unwell or weak all over?

dehydration.plain_language_question: Have you been very dry, dizzy when standing, or unable to keep fluids down?

low_urine_output.plain_language_question: Have you been passing much less urine than usual?

chest_pain.plain_language_question: Do you have any chest pain or tightness?

palpitations.plain_language_question: Have you felt your heart racing or beating irregularly?

leg_swelling.plain_language_question: Have you had swelling in one or both legs?

claudication.plain_language_question: Do you get leg pain when walking?

shortness_of_breath.plain_language_question: Have you had any difficulty in breathing?

wheeze.plain_language_question: Do you hear a whistling sound when you breathe?

pleuritic_pain.plain_language_question: Does the pain get worse when you take a deep breath or cough?

stridor.plain_language_question: Is your breathing noisy or harsh?

runny_nose.plain_language_question: Do you have a runny nose?

exertional_dyspnea.plain_language_question: Do you get short of breath with physical activity?

orthopnea.ui_label: Short of breath when lying flat
orthopnea.plain_language_question: Is your breathing worse when you lie flat?

paroxysmal_nocturnal_dyspnea.ui_label: Waking short of breath at night
paroxysmal_nocturnal_dyspnea.plain_language_question: Do you wake from sleep short of breath or gasping for air?

sore_throat.plain_language_question: Do you have a sore throat?

diarrhea.plain_language_question: Have you had loose stool or diarrhea?

blood_in_stool.plain_language_question: Have you noticed blood in your stool?

rectal_bleeding.plain_language_question: Any blood noticed when wiping or in the toilet bowl?

melena.plain_language_question: Has your stool been black or tarry?

abdominal_distension.plain_language_question: Has your abdomen become swollen or more bloated than usual?

bloating.plain_language_question: Does it feel bloated or full of gas?

coffee_ground_vomit.plain_language_question: Has the vomit looked dark like coffee grounds?

change_in_bowel_habit.plain_language_question: Have your bowel movements changed recently?

jaundice.plain_language_question: Have you noticed yellowing of your eyes or skin?

dysuria.ui_label: Pain or burning when passing urine
dysuria.plain_language_question: Do you have pain or burning when you pass urine?

urinary_frequency.plain_language_question: Are you passing urine more often than usual?

urinary_urgency.plain_language_question: Do you get a sudden strong urge to pass urine?

hematuria.plain_language_question: Have you noticed blood in your urine?

flank_pain.ui_label: Pain in the side or back near the kidney
flank_pain.plain_language_question: Do you have pain in your side or back near the kidney?

inability_to_pass_urine.plain_language_question: Are you unable to pass urine?

incontinence.plain_language_question: Have you had any loss of bladder control?

urethral_discharge.plain_language_question: Have you noticed any discharge from the urethra?

testicular_pain.plain_language_question: Have you had pain in a testicle or the scrotum?

foamy_urine.plain_language_question: Is your urine foamy or frothy?

dizziness.plain_language_question: Have you felt dizzy, lightheaded, or near-fainting?

fainting.plain_language_question: Have you fainted or passed out?

loss_of_consciousness.plain_language_question: Have you actually passed out or lost consciousness?

seizure.plain_language_question: Have you had a seizure or fit?

clustered_events.plain_language_question: Did more than one event happen close together?

confusion.plain_language_question: Have you felt confused or not yourself?

neck_stiffness.plain_language_question: Is your neck stiff or painful to bend?

photophobia.plain_language_question: Is bright light bothering your eyes more than usual?

numbness.plain_language_question: Have you had numbness or loss of feeling anywhere?

tingling.plain_language_question: Have you had tingling or pins-and-needles?

memory_loss.plain_language_question: Have you had any memory problems?

speech_difficulty.plain_language_question: Have you had trouble speaking or getting your words out?

vision_changes.plain_language_question: Have you had any change in your vision?

joint_swelling.plain_language_question: Have any of your joints become swollen?

stiffness.plain_language_question: Have you felt stiffness in your muscles or joints?

limited_range_of_motion.plain_language_question: Do you have limited movement in any joint?

inability_to_bear_weight.plain_language_question: Are you unable to bear weight on it?

sciatica.plain_language_question: Do you have pain shooting down your leg?

rash.plain_language_question: Do you have any rash or new skin spots?

lesions.plain_language_question: Have you noticed any skin lesions or sores?

changes_in_moles.plain_language_question: Have any moles changed in size, shape, or color?

hair_loss.plain_language_question: Have you noticed unusual hair loss?

mucosal_involvement.plain_language_question: Have you had sores or rash in your mouth or other moist areas?

heat_intolerance.plain_language_question: Do you feel unusually hot or intolerant to heat?

excessive_urination.plain_language_question: Have you been passing urine much more often or in larger amounts than usual?

lymph_node_swelling.plain_language_question: Have you noticed any swollen glands or lymph nodes?

anemia_symptoms.plain_language_question: Have you felt pale, tired, or short of breath?

anxiety.plain_language_question: Have you felt anxious or worried?

depression.plain_language_question: Have you felt down, depressed, or hopeless?

mood_changes.plain_language_question: Have you noticed any changes in your mood?

suicidal_ideation.plain_language_question: Have you had thoughts of harming yourself?

hallucinations.plain_language_question: Have you seen or heard things that others do not?

low_mood_anhedonia.ui_label: Low mood or loss of interest
low_mood_anhedonia.plain_language_question: Have you had low mood or loss of interest in things you usually enjoy?

pregnancy_context.plain_language_question: Could you be pregnant now, or are you recently postpartum?

lmp.plain_language_question: When was the first day of your last menstrual period?

timing_with_cycle.plain_language_question: Do your symptoms seem related to your menstrual cycle?

contraceptive_use.plain_language_question: Are you using any contraception or hormonal treatment that may be relevant?

menopausal_status.plain_language_question: Are you still having periods regularly, are they irregular, or have they stopped completely?

douching.plain_language_question: Have you used douching, vaginal washes, or internal products recently?

local_hygiene_products.plain_language_question: Have you recently changed pads, soaps, creams, lubricants, or other local products?

gynecologic_history_other.plain_language_question: Is there any other gynecologic or obstetric history we should know about?

menstrual_history.plain_language_question: How heavy are your periods? Any change in cycle?

prior_anaemia.plain_language_question: Have you been told you have anaemia before?

known_heart_failure.plain_language_question: Have you ever been told you have heart failure?

known_kidney_disease.plain_language_question: Do you have any known kidney problems?

known_liver_disease.plain_language_question: Do you have any liver problems?

osa_screen.plain_language_question: Do you snore loudly or feel excessively sleepy during the day?

pitting_character.plain_language_question: If you press on the swollen area, does it leave an indent?

diurnal_variation.plain_language_question: Is the swelling worse at the end of the day?

recent_change_in_pattern.plain_language_question: Has the pattern changed noticeably in the last few weeks?

amount_lost.plain_language_question: How much weight have you lost?

rapid_loss.plain_language_question: Did the weight come off quickly over days to weeks?

associated_symptoms.plain_language_question: Have any other symptoms come with it?

skin_changes_over_swelling.plain_language_question: Any skin changes over the swollen area?

pain_specific_location.plain_language_question: Do you have pain specific location?

character.plain_language_question: What does the pain feel like, for example throbbing, sharp, dull, burning, cramping, pressure-like, stabbing, or aching?

unable_to_speak_full_sentences.plain_language_question: Do you have unable to speak full sentences?

post_tussive_vomiting.plain_language_question: Do you have post tussive vomiting?

severe_abdominal_pain.plain_language_question: Do you have severe abdominal pain?

difficulty_passing_stool.plain_language_question: Do you have difficulty passing stool?

clots_in_urine.plain_language_question: Do you have clots in urine?

menstrual_flow_pads.plain_language_question: Do you have menstrual flow pads?

recent_immobility.plain_language_question: Have you been stuck in bed, on a long trip, or not moving around much recently?

recent_sexual_exposure.plain_language_question: Do you have recent sexual exposure?

recent_trauma.plain_language_question: Did this start after an injury, fall, blow, or accident?

recent_head_trauma.plain_language_question: Do you have recent head trauma?

recent_medication_exposure.plain_language_question: Do you have recent medication exposure?

past_medical_history.plain_language_question: Do you have past medical history?

past_surgical_history.plain_language_question: Do you have past surgical history?

recent_surgery.plain_language_question: Have you had any recent surgery or procedure?

calf_pain.plain_language_question: Is there pain or tenderness in the calf of the swollen leg?

calf_redness.plain_language_question: Is there redness or warmth in the calf of the swollen leg?

facial_swelling.plain_language_question: Have you had facial or lip swelling?

food_restriction.plain_language_question: Have you been intentionally restricting food, avoiding meals, or eating much less than usual?

loss_of_consciousness_details.plain_language_question: Do you have loss of consciousness details?

paroxysmal_nocturnal_dyspnea_details.plain_language_question: Do you have paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnea details?

facial_swelling_details.plain_language_question: Do you have facial swelling details?

tongue_swelling_details.plain_language_question: Do you have tongue swelling details?

calf_pain_details.plain_language_question: Do you have calf pain details?

calf_redness_details.plain_language_question: Do you have calf redness details?

presenting_complaint_narrative.plain_language_question: Please provide information about presenting complaint narrative.

weight_change.plain_language_question: Please provide information about weight change.

bowel_pattern_change.plain_language_question: Please provide information about bowel pattern change.

bowel_dysfunction.plain_language_question: Have you had new trouble controlling your bowels or new loss of stool control?

bladder_dysfunction.plain_language_question: Have you had new trouble passing urine or controlling your bladder?

nutrition_status.plain_language_question: How is your usual diet and nutrition, including restricted eating, food avoidance, or poor access to food?

prior_clot_history.plain_language_question: Have you ever had a blood clot, such as DVT or pulmonary embolism?

prior_clot_history_details.plain_language_question: When did it happen, where was the clot, and what treatment did you receive?

local_inflammation_over_swelling.plain_language_question: Is there redness, warmth, tenderness, or skin irritation over the swollen area?

throat_irritant_exposure.plain_language_question: Was there a recent exposure to smoke, dust, chemicals, allergens, or another throat irritant?

bowel_obstruction_symptom.ui_label: Unable to pass stool or gas
bowel_obstruction_symptom.plain_language_question: Are you unable to pass stool or gas?

abnormal_vaginal_bleeding.plain_language_question: Have you had heavy or unusual vaginal bleeding?

vulvovaginal_irritation.plain_language_question: Do you have itching or irritation?

ocular_redness_pain.plain_language_question: Do you have eye redness or eye pain with the headache?

severe_skin_blistering.plain_language_question: Have you had any blistering or peeling of the skin?

weight_loss_intent_details.plain_language_question: What were you doing to lose weight, such as diet, exercise, or medication?

upper_body_radiation.plain_language_question: Does the pain spread to your arm, shoulder, neck, or jaw?

fracture_risk_history.plain_language_question: Do you have osteoporosis or long-term steroid use?

family_history_urologic_cancer.plain_language_question: Any family history of bladder or kidney cancer?

meningitis_vaccine_history.plain_language_question: Have you had meningococcal or Hib vaccination before?

gait_balance_problem.plain_language_question: Do you have any balance or walking problems?

low_mood_reduced_intake.plain_language_question: Any depression, reduced intake, or deliberate restriction?

lump_swelling.plain_language_question: Have you noticed a swelling or lump?

bowel_dysfunction_details.plain_language_question: What bowel control problem have you noticed and when did it start?

bladder_dysfunction_details.plain_language_question: What bladder problem have you noticed and when did it start?

timing.plain_language_question: When does it happen or when is it worst?

weight_loss_intentionality.plain_language_question: Was the weight loss intentional, or were you not trying to lose weight?

swelling_location.plain_language_question: Where is the swelling — feet, ankles, legs, hands, face, abdomen, or all over?

swelling_distribution.plain_language_question: Is the swelling on one side, both sides, or generalized all over?

acute_unilateral_swelling.plain_language_question: Did one leg or one area become swollen suddenly?

rapid_weight_gain.plain_language_question: Have you gained weight rapidly over the past few days or weeks?

swelling_related_medications.plain_language_question: Are you taking any medicines that can cause swelling, such as amlodipine, steroids, NSAIDs, gabapentin, or pioglitazone?

hypothyroid_symptoms.plain_language_question: Have you had symptoms such as cold intolerance, constipation, dry skin, or unexplained weight gain?

weight_loss_timeframe.plain_language_question: Over what period of time did you lose that weight?

hyperthyroid_symptoms.plain_language_question: Have you had heat intolerance, tremor, sweating, anxiety, or a racing heartbeat?

severe_weakness.plain_language_question: Have you felt severely weak or unable to do normal activities?

authoritative_runtime_principles.runtime_source_of_truth: Complaint wording and executable schedules live in complaint files. Shared defines naming, registries, ownership, deduplication, and reusable rules.
authoritative_runtime_principles.complaint_budget_authority: Every complaint owns its own budget. There is no universal complaint-level target budget.
authoritative_runtime_principles.schedule_authority: Each complaint question_schedule is executable order, not a hint.
authoritative_runtime_principles.ros_gap_fill_principle: After complaint clerking, ROS should review unresolved system symptoms without repeating concepts already captured in HPC/HPI, derived state, prior ROS, or module history.
authoritative_runtime_principles.history_module_principle: PMH/PSH, medications/allergies, social/family, gynecologic, and immunization history are generalized shared modules first. Complaint files should ask only targeted follow-up when clinically necessary.
authoritative_runtime_principles.concept_resolution_principle: A concept should be asked once per session unless immediate safety requires clarification.

principles: One concept, one live canonical field name everywhere.
Default rule: id equals field equals canonical_concept.
ui_label is display-only and may differ from field.
Do not use compound live fields when clinically distinct concepts exist.
Do not keep British and American spellings as parallel live concepts.
Retired names may exist only in alias maps for compatibility, not as rebuilt active fields.

question_category_registry.characterization_field: Universal HPC/HPI clerking field such as onset, duration, timing, severity, location, character, course, radiation, aggravating factors, relieving factors, or functional impact.
question_category_registry.complaint_related_symptom: Symptom used in clerking the presenting complaint because it helps characterize the active problem.
question_category_registry.symptom_qualifier: Reusable non-ROS qualifier or discriminator that sharpens a symptom but is not itself a standard ROS symptom.
question_category_registry.ros_symptom: True patient-reported review-of-systems symptom by body system.
question_category_registry.history_module_field: Field owned by PMH/PSH, medications/allergies, social/family, gynecologic, or immunization modules.

presenting_complaint_narrative.text: Please tell me briefly what brought you in today and how this started.

pattern.text: Is it there all the time, or does it come and go?

duration.text: How long has this been going on altogether?

episode_duration.text: When it happens, how long does each episode last?

timing.text: When does it happen or when is it worst?

severity.text: How severe is it on a scale of 0 to 10?

character.text: What does the pain feel like, for example throbbing, sharp, dull, burning, cramping, pressure-like, stabbing, or aching?

course.text: Has it been getting better, worse, or staying the same?

radiation.text: Does it travel or spread anywhere else?

functional_impact.text: How is this affecting what you can do?

NARRATIVE_FREE_TEXT.description: Open narrative answer in the patient's own words.

SHORT_TEXT.description: Short patient answer, phrase, or sentence.

BOOLEAN_WITH_OPTIONAL_DETAILS.description: Yes/no answer, optionally followed by details when positive.

TEMPORAL_WITH_UNIT_OR_SHORT_TEXT.description: Time-based answer using units or short text.

NUMERIC_OR_SHORT_TEXT.description: Numeric answer or short text when exact number is unavailable.

COUNT_OR_SHORT_TEXT.description: Numeric count when available, otherwise a short description.

TEMPORAL_OR_SHORT_TEXT.description: Short description of timing, chronology, or course.

ALWAYS.description: Ask this question whenever it appears in the active flow.

SEX_FEMALE_REPRODUCTIVE_AGE.description: Use for pregnancy- and gyne-relevant questions.

SEX_FEMALE.description: Ask only if the patient is female.

SEX_MALE.description: Ask only if the patient is male.

DURATION_GTE_4_WEEKS.description: Use for chronic or prolonged symptom follow-up.

PAIN_SITE_IS_FLANK.description: Use for renal or flank-specific follow-up.

GYNECOLOGIC_CONTEXT_RELEVANT.condition: primary_complaint IN ['vaginal_discharge','abdominal_pain','vomiting','dysuria','hematuria','constipation','fatigue','weight_loss'] OR pregnancy_context == 'yes' OR last_menstrual_period_exists == true
GYNECOLOGIC_CONTEXT_RELEVANT.description: Use when gynecologic or pregnancy-related context may matter.

SEXUAL_HISTORY_RELEVANT_SESSION.condition: primary_complaint IN ['vaginal_discharge','dysuria','hematuria','abdominal_pain','sore_throat'] OR new_partner == 'yes' OR known_sti_exposure == 'yes'
SEXUAL_HISTORY_RELEVANT_SESSION.description: Use when STI-related or sexual-history questions may be clinically relevant.

INFECTIOUS_OR_GU_PRESENTATION.condition: primary_complaint IN ['fever','cough','sore_throat','rash','vomiting','diarrhea','dysuria','hematuria','vaginal_discharge'] OR fever == 'yes' OR dysuria == 'yes'
INFECTIOUS_OR_GU_PRESENTATION.description: Use when infection- or GU-linked history such as recent antibiotics may matter.

PATIENT_PEDIATRIC_OR_CAREGIVER_HISTORY_R.description: Use when pediatric or caregiver-provided history changes questioning.

MUCOSAL_INVOLVEMENT_POSITIVE.description: Ask only if mucosal involvement has been confirmed.

POSSIBLE_TB_PRESENTATION.condition: tb_exposure == 'yes' OR hemoptysis == 'yes' OR night_sweats == 'yes' OR weight_loss == 'yes' OR (duration_weeks >= 2 AND primary_complaint == 'cough')
POSSIBLE_TB_PRESENTATION.description: Use when TB is part of the differential.

POSSIBLE_CNS_INFECTION_PRESENTATION.condition: neck_stiffness == 'yes' OR photophobia == 'yes' OR altered_mental_status == 'yes' OR confusion == 'yes' OR (fever == 'yes' AND primary_complaint IN ['headache','fever','sore_throat'])
POSSIBLE_CNS_INFECTION_PRESENTATION.description: Use when meningitis or another CNS infection is possible.

FIELD_ALREADY_CAPTURED.description: Skip if the field already has a value in session state.

DETAIL_ALREADY_CAPTURED.description: Skip if the detail field for this concept is already populated.

PARENT_NEGATIVE.description: Skip detail question if the parent concept is not positive.

ROS_CONCEPT_ALREADY_COVERED.description: Skip ROS question if the concept was already captured in HPC/HPI, prior ROS, or another complaint flow.

SAME_FIELD_ASKED_IN_OVERLAP_SESSION.description: Skip if the same field was already asked in a co-active overlapping complaint flow.

PATIENT_PEDIATRIC.description: Skip adult-only questions for young children.

PATIENT_ELDERLY_SKIP_PREGNANCY.description: Skip pregnancy-focused questions for patients above the configured age threshold.

QUESTION_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED.description: Skip non-critical follow-up when budget is exhausted.

SEVERITY_BELOW_8.description: Skip extreme pain screens if severity is below 8.

SEVERITY_BELOW_7.description: Skip questions that require severity 7 or above.

TIMING_ALREADY_RESOLVED.description: Skip timing follow-up if the timing pattern has already been resolved by earlier high-priority questions.

PAIN_SITE_NOT_FLANK.description: Skip flank-specific clarification if the pain site is not flank.

DURATION_BELOW_2_WEEKS.description: Skip chronicity-dependent screens when duration is below 2 weeks.

DURATION_BELOW_4_WEEKS.description: Skip chronic-only questions when duration is below 4 weeks.

PATTERN_NOT_EPISODIC.condition: pattern answer does not indicate intermittent/episodic symptoms
PATTERN_NOT_EPISODIC.description: Skip episode-duration questions unless the pattern answer indicates the symptom comes and goes in episodes.

final_closeout_question.text: Is there anything else you want to mention that we have not asked about yet?

meningitis_screen.label: Possible meningitis pattern
meningitis_screen.message: Fever with neck stiffness, confusion, or light sensitivity may require immediate clinical review.

severe_headache_with_fever.label: Severe headache with fever
severe_headache_with_fever.message: Severe headache with fever should receive urgent clinician review.

thunderclap_headache_screen.label: Possible thunderclap headache pattern
thunderclap_headache_screen.message: Sudden severe headache features may require immediate clinical review.

focal_neurologic_deficit_screen.label: Possible focal neurologic deficit pattern
focal_neurologic_deficit_screen.message: New weakness, speech difficulty, vision change, numbness, or focal neurologic symptoms may require immediate clinical review.

cardiac_chest_pain_screen.label: Possible high-risk chest pain pattern
cardiac_chest_pain_screen.message: Chest pain with exertional features, breathlessness, sweating, fainting, or rest pain may require immediate clinical review.

aortic_pain_screen.label: Possible tearing vascular pain pattern
aortic_pain_screen.message: Tearing or ripping pain with radiation may require immediate clinical review.

pulmonary_embolism_screen.label: Possible pulmonary embolism pattern
pulmonary_embolism_screen.message: Breathlessness or chest pain with clot-risk features should receive urgent clinician review.

respiratory_distress_screen.label: Possible respiratory distress pattern
respiratory_distress_screen.message: Severe breathlessness, cyanosis, confusion, stridor, or inability to speak full sentences may require immediate clinical review.

airway_or_anaphylaxis_screen.label: Possible airway or anaphylaxis pattern
airway_or_anaphylaxis_screen.message: Tongue/facial swelling with breathing or airway symptoms may require immediate clinical review.

gi_bleed_screen.label: Possible GI bleeding pattern
gi_bleed_screen.message: Blood in vomit, coffee-ground vomit, black/tarry stool, or blood in stool should receive urgent clinician review.

bowel_obstruction_screen.label: Possible bowel obstruction pattern
bowel_obstruction_screen.message: Abdominal distension with inability to pass stool or gas, or severe abdominal pain, should receive urgent clinician review.

pregnancy_abdominal_pain_bleeding_screen.label: Possible pregnancy-related abdominal pain or bleeding pattern
pregnancy_abdominal_pain_bleeding_screen.message: Pregnancy context with abdominal pain, vaginal bleeding, or fainting may require immediate clinical review.

sepsis_or_systemic_instability_screen.label: Possible systemic instability pattern
sepsis_or_systemic_instability_screen.message: Fever with confusion, low urine output, marked weakness, or breathlessness should receive urgent clinician review.

cauda_equina_screen.label: Possible cauda equina pattern
cauda_equina_screen.message: Back pain with saddle anesthesia, bowel/bladder symptoms, or leg weakness may require immediate clinical review.

septic_joint_screen.label: Possible septic joint pattern
septic_joint_screen.message: Joint pain with fever and an inflamed joint should receive urgent clinician review.

urinary_retention_screen.label: Urinary retention pattern
urinary_retention_screen.message: Inability to pass urine should receive urgent clinician review.

pyelonephritis_or_upper_uti_screen.label: Possible upper urinary infection pattern
pyelonephritis_or_upper_uti_screen.message: Urinary symptoms with fever, chills, or flank pain should receive urgent clinician review.

high_risk_seizure_screen.label: High-risk seizure pattern
high_risk_seizure_screen.message: Seizure with head injury, fever, focal weakness, pregnancy context, or incomplete recovery may require immediate clinical review.

severe_rash_screen.label: Possible severe rash pattern
severe_rash_screen.message: Rash with blistering, peeling, mouth involvement, eye involvement, or breathing/facial swelling symptoms may require immediate clinical review.

dvt_screen.label: Possible DVT pattern
dvt_screen.message: Sudden unilateral swelling with calf pain/redness or clot-risk context should receive urgent clinician review.

heart_failure_oedema_screen.label: Possible cardiopulmonary oedema pattern
heart_failure_oedema_screen.message: Swelling with breathlessness, orthopnea, PND, chest pain, or rapid weight gain should receive urgent clinician review.

escalation_rule_policy.pattern: Evaluate accumulated session state against rule.condition; do not rely on single question-level escalation only.
escalation_rule_policy.severity_note: Avoid generic severity in global rules unless applies_to_complaints makes the severity meaning clear.
